name: property managers handling 5–15 vacation rentals tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 vacation rentals, inefficient booking and guest communication causes late responses and missed bookings. We streamline these processes instead of manual tracking and communication via email and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient booking and guest communication processes

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient booking and guest communication processes
